name: POST /api/integrations/google/sync
description:
Synchronizes Google Drive files with the platform.
Automatically downloads and processes new or updated files.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.value: {'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/integrations/google/sync', 'details': {'tags': ['Integrations'], 'summary': 'Sync Google Drive', 'description': 'Synchronizes Google Drive files with the platform.\nAutomatically downloads and processes new or updated files.', 'operationId': 'sync_google_drive_api_integrations_google_sync_post', 'security': [{'OAuth2PasswordBearer': []}], 'parameters': [{'name': 'X-Token', 'in': 'header', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'X-Token'}}], 'responses': {'200': {'description': 'Successful Response', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {}}}}, '422': {'description': 'Validation Error', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError'}}}}}}}
